mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO journal_entry_details ( journal_entry_id, line_number, account_code, account_name, debit_amount, credit_amount, description ) VALUES
(#{detail.journalEntryId}, #{detail.lineNumber}, #{detail.accountCode}, #{detail.accountName}, #{detail.debitAmount}, #{detail.creditAmount}, #{detail.description})
mapper.select: SELECT je.id, je.company_id, je.entry_date, je.description, je.total_debit_amount, je.total_credit_amount, je.status, je.confidence_score, je.posted_at, jed.id as detail_id, jed.journal_entry_id, jed.line_number, jed.account_code, jed.account_name, jed.debit_amount, jed.credit_amount, jed.description as detail_description FROM journal_entries je LEFT JOIN journal_entry_details jed ON je.id = jed.journal_entry_id WHERE je.id = #{id} ORDER BY jed.line_number

WITH balance_check AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(debit_amount), 0) as totalDebit, COALESCE(SUM(credit_amount), 0) as totalCredit, COUNT(*) as detail_count FROM journal_entry_details WHERE journal_entry_id = #{journalEntryId} ) SELECT totalDebit, totalCredit, CASE WHEN detail_count = 0 THEN false WHEN totalDebit = totalCredit THEN true ELSE false END as isBalanced FROM balance_check

SELECT je.id, je.company_id, je.entry_date, je.description, je.total_debit_amount, je.total_credit_amount, je.status, je.confidence_score, je.posted_at FROM journal_entries je WHERE je.reference_type = 'TRANSACTION' AND je.reference_id = #{transactionId}

SELECT jed.id, jed.journal_entry_id, jed.line_number, jed.account_code, jed.account_name, jed.debit_amount, jed.credit_amount, jed.description FROM journal_entry_details jed WHERE jed.journal_entry_id = #{journalEntryId} ORDER BY jed.line_number
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM journal_entries je WHERE je.company_id = #{companyId}::uuid AND je.entry_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND je.status IN ('DRAFT', 'APPROVED')

SELECT jeal.id, jeal.journal_entry_id, jeal.action_type, jeal.previous_status, jeal.new_status, jeal.user_id, jeal.notes, jeal.created_at FROM journal_entry_audit_logs jeal WHERE jeal.journal_entry_id = #{journalEntryId} ORDER BY jeal.created_at DESC
